form.formComment: Freshened since getting off the mark on debut; favourite; came from midfield and won by 2 len at this track February 22 over 1000m defeating Run Run Sunrise carrying 58kg at $3. Can go right on with the job now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Freshened since getting off the mark on debut; favourite; came from midfield and won by 2 len at this track February 22 over 1000m defeating Run Run Sunrise carrying 58kg at $3. Can go right on with the job now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping, bumped heavily on the hindquarters and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Resuming after ten weeks in the paddock. Finished off last preparation eighth of 12 at Happy Valley January 28 over 1000m, 3 len behind Copartner Fleet with 56.5kg at $4. When resuming last campaign sixth of 12 at Happy Valley September 10 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Harmony Fire carrying 58.5kg at $11. Should be ready to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in at the start and bumped.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 4th of 12 at this track on January 11 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Majestic Valour with 57.5kg at $18. Second-up 11th of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 9 len behind Smart Golf carrying 57.5kg at $26. Nicely placed to get off the mark this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Having third race start. At debut, 4th of 12 at this track on January 11 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Majestic Valour with 57.5kg at $18. Second-up 11th of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 9 len behind Smart Golf carrying 57.5kg at $26. Nicely placed to get off the mark this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping and bumped with Dash.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Happy Valley on March 4 over 1200m, 5 len behind Gameplayer Elite with 55.5kg at $7.80. The run before that 6th of 12 at Happy Valley on February 11 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Bunta Baby carrying 57kg at $9.70. Rates highly and can break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Comes off a 33 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Happy Valley on March 4 over 1200m, 5 len behind Gameplayer Elite with 55.5kg at $7.80. The run before that 6th of 12 at Happy Valley on February 11 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Bunta Baby carrying 57kg at $9.70. Rates highly and can break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m raced tight between Viva Boss and Genius Baby.
Shortly after the start crowded between Beauty Thunder and Sir Charge.
Jumped only fairly. Shortly after the start shifted out slightly.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 11 at Sha Tin All Weather on March 8 over 1200m, 3 len behind Juicy Dragon carrying 54.5kg at $18. The start before that faded in the straight 7th of 12 at Happy Valley on February 11 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Bunta Baby with 56.5kg at $16. Likely to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 13 at this track on March 8 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Run Run Sunrise with 53kg at $53. Before that second last of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1000m, 8 len behind Almighty Lightning carrying 54.5kg at $11. Must improve off a last-start 12th over 1000m at this track to feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped only fairly. Held up for clear running between the 350m and the 200m.
Bumped on jumping. Raced wide and without cover from the 600m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Happy Valley on March 4 over 1200m, 4 len behind Giant Ballon with 52.5kg at $9.70. The start before that sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 11 at Happy Valley on February 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Master Resolute with 53.5kg at $9.40. Key runner.
